en: My son got big.

tr: Youtube benim işimi daha da büyütecek.
en: Youtube will make my business bigger.

tr: Bu tişört küçüldü. Onu artık giyemiyorum.
en: This tshirt got small. I can’t wear it anymore.
Living in this country made my dreams small.

tr: Her geçen gün daha da yaşlandığımı hissediyorum.
en: I feel that I get older every day.
This heart operation made Ali older.
Everything got expensive.
Everything got more expensive.
Inflation makes house prices more expensive.
Ayşe got rich.
Selling her father's houses made Ayşe rich.
We got sick.
Cold weather makes us sick.
We got even poorer.
Inflation made Turkish people poor.
I got tired.
Running in the forest for 2 hours made me tired.
They got stupid.

tr: Günde 8 saat instagramda olmak herkesi aptallaştırır.
en: Being on Instagram for 8 hours a day makes everyone stupid.
Ali got hungry.
Studying made Ali hungry.
Ayşe got thirsty.
The summer sun made Ayşe thirsty.
I got sad.
Seeing that you are unhappy made me sad.
I got wise.
Reading books makes you wise.
I got cold.
The cold wind made me cold.
I got hot.
Walking under the sun made me hot.
I got experienced.

tr: Bu şirkette on yıl çalışmak beni tecrübelendirdi.
en: Working at this company for ten years made me experienced.
I got relaxed.
The massage made me relaxed.
I got stronger.
The things that don't kill you makes you stonger / What doesn't kill you makes you stronger.
The man's heart got slow.
The children made us slow.
The tomatoes got cheaper.

tr: Çok sayıda domates üretmek domates fiyatlarını ucuzlattı.
en: Producing a lot of tomatoes made the prices of tomatoes cheaper.
Ayşe did her hair.
Ayşe had her hair done. / Ayşe got her hair done
I fixed my car.
I had my car fixed. / I got my car fixed
I cut the grass.
I had the grass cut. / I got the grass cut
She did her makeup.
She had her makeup done. / She got her makeup done.
Ayşe had her nose done. / Ayşe got her nose done.
Fatma had her lips done. / Fatma got her lips done.
Murat had his house rented. / Murat got his house rented.
I got my shoes polished for the party.
The manager had the salaries paid. / The manager got the salaries paid.
I had a new bank account opened. / I got a new bank account opened.
Ayşe had her nails done. / Ayşe got her nails done.
I had my tooth pulled. / I got my tooth pulled.
We had our house painted last year. / We got our house painted last year.
We will have our house painted next year. / We will get our house painted next year.
I had the door closed. / I got the door closed.
I had my house cleaned. / I got my house cleaned.
I had my books brought. / I got my books brought.
I had my emails sent. / I got my emails sent.
I had the questions solved. / I got the questions solved.
I had the window opened. / I got the window opened.
I had the children taken from the school. / I got the children taken from the school.
I had the money given. / I got the money given.
I had the song sung. / I got the song sung.
I had the food eaten. /I got the food eaten.
I had their money spent. / I got their money spent.
I had my house rented. / I got my house rented.
I had the laundry washed. / I got the laundry washed.
I had the dishes done. / I got the dishes done.
I had the breakfast prepared. / I got the breakfast prepared.
I had this logo designed. / I got this logo designed.
They had this car produced. / They got this car produced.
They had my house sold. / They got my house sold.
I had the bill paid. / I got the bill paid.
I had the children looked after. / I got the children looked after.
I had my flowers grown. / I got my flowers grown.
I had my wallet searched for. / I got my wallet looked for.
I had my wallet found. / I got my wallet found.
I had the garden watered. / I got the garden watered.
I had the project continued. / I got the project continued.
I had the match ended. / I got the match ended.
I had the results checked. / I got the results checked.
I had his coat taken off. / I got his coat taken off.
Ayşe had her makeup done. / Ayşe got her makeup done.
Murat had his tooth pulled. / Murat got his tooth pulled.
They had the safe emptied. / They got the safe emptied.
They had the basket filled. / They got the basket filled.
I’ll call you.
I’ll have my lawyer call you. / I'll get my lawyer (to) call you
I’ll just take a look. / I'm just gonna take a look.
I’ll have my doctor take a look. / I'm gonna have my doctor take a look / I'll got my doctor (to) take a look.
I’ll measure my blood pressure. / I'm gonna measure my blood pressure.
I’ll have the nurse measure my blood pressure. / I'm gonna have the nurse measure my blood pressure. / I'll get the nurse (to) measure my blood pressure.
My son doesn’t study.
I can’t have my son study. / I can't get my son (to) study.
Ayşe had the hairdresser do her nails. / Ayşe got the hairdresser (to) do her nails.
I had the dentist pull my tooth. / I got the dentist (to) pull my tooth.

tr: Geçen yıl evimizi iyi bir adama boyattık.
en: We had a good man paint our house last year. / We got a good man (to) paint our house last year.

tr: Gelecek yıl evimizi iyi bir boyacıya boyattıracağız.
en: We will have a good painter paint our house next year. / We will get a good painter (to) paint our house next year.
I had the student close the door. / I got the student (to) close the door.
I had the cleaning lady clean my house. / I got the cleaning lady (to) clean my house.
I had my son bring my books. / I got my son (to) bring the books
I had my secretary send the emails. / I got my secretary (to) send the emails.
I had my students solve the questions. / I got my students (to) solve the questions.
I had my daughter open the window. / I got my daughter (to) open the window.
I had the singer sing the song. / I got the singer (to) sing the song
I had the children eat their meals. / I got the children (to) eat their meals.
I didn't have my friend spend his money. / I didnt get my friend (to) spend his money.
I had my wife wash the laundry. / I got my wife (to) wash the laundry
I had my husband wash the dishes. / I got my husband (to) do the dishes.
I had my son prepare the breakfast. / I got my son (to) prepare the breakfast.

tr: Bu logoyu iyi bir tasarımcıya tasarlattım.
en: I had a good designer design this logo. / I got a good designer (to) design this logo.
They had us produce this car. / They got us (to) produce this car.
They had me sell my house . / They got me (to) sell my house.
I didn't have anyone pay the bill. / I didn't get anyone (to) pay the bill.
I had the gardener water the garden. / I got the gardener (to) water the garden.
They had the referee end the match. / They got the referee (to) end the match.
I had my students check the results. / I got my students (to) check the results.
Murat had the dentist pull his tooth. / Murat got the dentist (to) pull his tooth.
They had us fill the basket. / They got us (to) fill the basket.
They made me do it.
You can’t make me do it!
I made my son study.
They made me send the money.
Nobody made you do it!
They make us pay for their own mistakes.
They will make me do it.
They made the children study.
They want to make us pay for their own responsibilities.
You can't make me wash the dishes!
I don't want to make my son study.
They made me close my eyes.
They made me open my hands.
They forced me to send the money.
They made me steal the money.
They made me say the answer.
They made me call you.
They made me cancel the holiday.

tr: Sana bu kitabı zorla okutmak istemiyorum.
en: I don't want to make you read this book.
You can't make me love you.
Nobody made you do this.
They made me work on their farm.
They made me drink the poison.
They made me tell a lie.
The soldiers made us go out.
I made my grandfather take his medicine.
